tasks.blockedBy: profile links are not all set/live
tasks.title: 他沉默時，你最想聽見哪一句話？
tasks.caption:
你不是想聽甜言蜜語，你只是想確認自己有沒有被看見。

完成 15 題測驗，找到你的情感守護者：https://lovetypes.tw/start/?utm_source=shorts&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=first_round_quiz_completion&utm_content=iris_silence

留言 A/B/C，或寫下一句你最想被說出口的話。
#五種愛之語測驗 #情感守護者 #心語庭園 #錯頻修復 #LoveTypes
tasks.publishCommand: python3 tools/promotion_post_writeback.py update --platform youtube_shorts --task-id publish-lt-s01-iris-silence --status published --published-date 2026-06-14 --post-url <REAL_YOUTUBE_SHORTS_URL> --proof-note "public URL and analytics source checked 2026-06-14"
tasks.kpiCommand: python3 tools/promotion_post_writeback.py update --platform youtube_shorts --task-id publish-lt-s01-iris-silence --status published --published-date 2026-06-14 --post-url <REAL_YOUTUBE_SHORTS_URL> --site-clicks 0 --quiz-starts 0 --quiz-completions 0 --proof-note "platform analytics checked 2026-06-14"
